scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_account_extras.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0004_training_results_v2.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0005_reset_intermediate_scores.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0006_create_missed_problems.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0007_create_problem_attempts.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0008_add_ranking_excluded_flag.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0009_add_season_points.sql && wrangler d1 execute poker-app-db --remote --file=./migrations/0010_create_achievements.sql
